_metadata.name: CORS Auth Edge Misconfig Triage
_metadata.description: Authorized bug bounty workflow that probes live web/API URLs for reflected CORS origins, credentialed cross-origin access, permissive preflight methods, and sensitive exposed headers.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: CORS Auth Edge Misconfig Triage
manifest.description: Probe authorized live URLs for actionable CORS and auth-edge misconfiguration signals.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: CORS Auth Edge Misconfig Triage
graph.description: Focused CORS/auth-edge probe for authorized live web and API URLs.

runtimeInputs.label: Live URLs
runtimeInputs.description: Authorized HTTP or HTTPS URLs to probe for CORS and auth-edge behavior.

runtimeInputs.label: Test origins
runtimeInputs.description: Optional attacker-controlled Origin values. Defaults to safe synthetic origins when omitted.

runtimeInputs.label: Authorization notes
runtimeInputs.description: Program scope, exclusions, and rate-limit notes to include in the report.
